title: Better Than XP Bottles
description: store your hard-earned experience levels into bottles for later use or safe-keeping
body:
# Bottle Your XP

**Tired of losing your levels upon death? Need a way to trade experience with friends?**

**Better Than XP Bottles** is the ultimate utility for experience management. Simple, intuitive, and perfectly balanced.

---

##  Key Features

###  True Level Storage
Most mods only store experience *points*, which can be inefficient due to how Minecraft's level scaling works. **Bottle Your XP** stores **exact levels**. If you put 10 levels in, you get 10 levels back.

###  Effortless Bottling
No complex machinery needed. Just hold a glass bottle and **Shift + Right-click**. 
- Your levels are instantly transferred.
- The bottle is automatically labeled with the level count.
- Bottles stack naturally in your backpack or chests.

###  Full Configuration
Tailor the mod to your server's needs. Whether you want small 5-level vials or massive 50-level jars, you're in control.

---

##  How to Play

1. **Bottle it up**: Sneak and Right-click with an empty bottle.
2. **Bank it**: Stack your level bottles in a chest for safekeeping.
3. **Use it**: Throw like a normal splash bottle to instantly regain your levels!

---

##  Settings & Compatibility

| Feature | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Default XP per Bottle** | 10 Levels |
| **Configurable Range** | 1 - 100 Levels |
| **Required Dependencies** | Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin |
| **Recommended Mods** | [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (for in-game config) |

---

###  Get Started
Download now and never fear losing your precious levels again!
